tasks.description: T00: 项目初始化 - 目录结构、go.mod、Taskfile构建脚本
T01: 配置系统 - koanf多源配置加载，所有Config struct定义，环境变量注入
T02: Protobuf定义 - TaskService 8个RPC方法，buf generate代码生成
T03: 共享内核类型 - TaskStatus/SubtaskType/AgentRole枚举，ULID生成器，通用错误类型
T04: 错误码定义 - L1_001~L5_802错误码体系，所有业务错误类型定义
T05: 领域事件框架 - DomainEvent结构，OutboxWriter接口，状态机声明式框架，所有仓库接口定义
T10: PostgreSQL连接 - pgx/v5连接池，ent生成器配置，事务管理封装，migrate迁移框架
T11: 数据库迁移脚本 - tasks/subtasks/audit_logs/outbox_events四张表的ent schema和迁移文件
T12: Redis客户端 - go-redis/v9连接，缓存层封装，分布式锁基础接口
T13: Outbox系统 - OutboxWriter事务内写入，轮询器后台转发，Redis Stream发布
T20: Task领域模型 - Task+Subtask领域实体，9态状态机声明式定义，所有转换规则和守卫条件
T21: Task存储层 - ent Schema定义(Task/Subtask/AuditLog)，Repository接口实现，CRUD操作
T22: Task服务层 - TaskService的5个方法(Submit/Get/List/Cancel/Decide)，输入校验，事务边界
T23: Gateway层 - connect-go handler，JWT解密(不验证)，sentinel-go限流，中间件链路
T30: 最小编排 - 单Agent路径pending→running→completed，复杂度路由入口，Eino Graph最小图
T31: ReAct Agent - LLM调用循环(Thought→Action→Observation，最多15步)，read_file/write_file工具
T32: Worker沙箱双实现 - Docker和CubeSandbox同时实现SandboxBackend接口，config切换backend类型
T33: Git集成 - go-git实现clone/commit/push到result branch，禁止push到main/master约束
T40: WebSocket Hub - 房间管理，所有事件类型(task.status_changed/agent.log/platform.worker_pool等)
T41: Eino全图编排 - 3路路由(简单/中等/复杂)，Graph定义，节点注册，边的连接
T42: 6个Agent角色 - observer/strategist/executor/guardian/tester/researcher的prompt模板和工具集分配
T43: Agent匹配算法 - 能力评分×0.5+历史成功率×0.3+成本效率×0.2，排序选择最优模板
T44: 上下文领域模型 - TaskContext/FileState/ConversationTurn领域实体，三层存储协议定义
T45: Redis热层 - 分布式锁(Redlock)，看门狗自动续期，热上下文读写接口
T46: 上下文传递服务 - full/summary/delta三种传递模式，Agent间上下文路由
T47: 全工具集 - 文件(5个)/Git(4个)/命令(1个)/LLM(1个)工具实现，角色权限表
T48: 人工审批 - Guardian触发confirming状态，超时机制(默认5分钟)，WebSocket推送approval_required
T49: MCP Server - 9 Tools(task_submit/status/list等) + 4 Resources(workspace/status/logs等)，SSE传输
T60: Worker池生产化 - 预热/扩缩容/健康检查，复用T32 SandboxBackend接口，Worker注册发现
T61: LLM路由插件 - Claude/GLM多模型路由，自适应升降级(连续3次<80%降级/连续5次>95%升级)
T62: 上下文压缩引擎 - L1规则压缩+L3 LLM智能压缩(必须保留goal/constraints/user_decisions/error_log)
T63: MinIO冷存储 - 上传/下载/签名URL(有效期1小时)/90天TTL自动清理，Artifact存储
T64: 业务Metrics - cap_前缀Prometheus指标全集(task/agent/llm各维度)，:9090/metrics端点
T65: 链路追踪 - OTel Spans(submit/decompose/execute/llm/tool)，OTLP导出，概率采样
T05a: 领域事件协议 - DomainEvent结构体定义，OutboxWriter接口，事件序列化
T05b: 状态机框架 - 声明式状态机定义(states/transitions/guards/actions)，每次转换自动increment_version
T05c: 仓库接口定义 - TaskRepository/SubtaskRepository/AuditLogRepository接口，所有接口方法签名
T13a: Outbox写入器 - 事务内OutboxWriter接口，同库同事务写入outbox_events表
T13b: Outbox轮询转发器 - 后台goroutine轮询pending事件，SELECT FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED，指数退避重试
T21a: ent Schema定义 - Task/Subtask/AuditLog三个Schema，字段/Edge/Index定义
T21b: Repository实现 - TaskRepo/SubtaskRepo/AuditLogRepo接口实现，ent client封装
T30a: 编排框架 - 复杂度路由入口，Eino Graph最小图定义，节点注册机制
T30b: 单Agent路径 - pending→running→completed最小执行路径，单角色直通
T31a: ReAct循环框架 - Thought→Action→Observation循环，最多15步，LLM调用封装
T31b: 基础工具集成 - read_file/write_file工具实现，Tool接口适配
T32a: SandboxBackend接口 - WorkerManager，按配置选择后端，支持自动降级
T32b: Docker沙箱实现 - DockerBackend，seccomp/AppArmor安全加固，2GB内存限制
T32c: CubeSandbox实现 - CubeSandboxBackend，MicroVM硬件隔离，<60ms启动
T41a: Eino Graph框架 - 3路路由(简单/中等/复杂)，Graph定义，条件边连接
T41b: Eino节点定义 - AnalyzerNode/RouterNode/ExecutorNode/GuardianNode/ResultMerger节点实现
T42a: Agent角色框架 - 角色接口定义，prompt模板结构，工具集分配表
T42b: 前3个Agent实现 - observer/strategist/executor角色完整实现
T42c: 后3个Agent实现 - guardian/tester/researcher角色完整实现
T47a: 文件工具集 - read_file/write_file/edit_file/list_files/search_code 5个工具实现
T47b: Git命令工具 - git_status/git_diff/git_commit/git_push实现，安全约束
T47c: 命令和LLM工具 - execute_command(白名单+超时)和ask_llm工具实现
T49a: MCP框架 - MCP Server骨架，SSE传输，Tool/Resource接口定义
T49b: MCP Tools实现 - 9个Tool(task_submit/status/list/cancel/decide/diff/wait/templates/status)完整实现
T49c: MCP Resources实现 - 4个Resource(cap://tasks/{id}/log/timeline/artifact/{id}, cap://platform/status)
Review: L2-Domain层 - statemachine/entity/errors/context/repositories
Review: L4-Service层 - task_service/context
Review: L1-Storage层 - pgx/minio/outbox/cleanup
Review: L5-Gateway层 - gateway/handler/middleware/ws
Review: plugins/orchestrator - Eino编排图/agent调度
Review: plugins/llmrouter - 多模型路由/Claude/GLM
Review: plugins/workermanager - Worker生命周期管理
Review: plugins/mcpserver - MCP Server 9 Tools
Review: plugins/gitclient - go-git克隆/提交/推送
Review: config + authz - 配置加载/JWT/API Key RBAC
Review: infra + guardian + observability - 基础设施/监控
Review: worker + mcp核心 - Worker沙箱/MCP协议
P0: main.go DI Assembly — Wire all components together
P0: gateway readyzHandler — Implement DB+Redis connectivity check
P0: Gateway+Service — Implement Decide/GetArtifact/GetDiff/Wait RPCs
P0: config.MustLoad — Call Validate() before returning
P1: golangci-lint configuration — .golangci.yml + CI gate
P1: GitHub Actions CI/CD — build + test + lint workflow
P1: Test Coverage — Bring unit test coverage to 60%
P1: Wire plugins into main.go — orchestrator + llmrouter + workermanager + mcpserver
P1: L3-Authz wiring — Full JWT verification + RBAC + sentinel-go in request path
P2: End-to-end smoke test — Submit task → single Agent execute → return result + Git push
P2: Prometheus alerting rules + Grafana dashboard — Production metrics
P2: Fault预案 — Redis故障/LLM限流/Worker泄漏 detection + graceful degradation
P2: OTel end-to-end tracing verification — All spans wired + Jaeger UI
P2: docker-compose.prod.yml — Production-grade deployment configuration
P2: Worker pool production tuning — Pool sizing + warm-up + auto-scale
P3: K8s deployment — Helm chart or Kustomize manifests
P3: Agent experience accumulation — Learn from past executions
P3: Smart task decomposition — Optimize subtask generation using historical data
P0: Docker healthcheck fix — /health endpoint + compose healthcheck alignment
P2: Prometheus metrics integration — Wire internal metrics to /9090/metrics endpoint
P2: Context compression L1+L3 — Redis hot layer + compression engine wired + triggered
P1: Worker Docker image — Dockerfile.worker + build in CI
P3: Dashboard Frontend — Task list UI + Agent logs + Cost analysis
Fix test failures — orchestrator test signature sync + workermanager ID generation + Docker storage-opt macOS compat + sandbox CubeSandbox tests
Fix: orchestrator test signature sync — NewOrchestrator added OrchestratorContextManager param, update all test calls
Fix: workermanager ID generation — replace nanosecond timestamp with ULID for unique IDs
Fix: Docker storage-opt macOS compat — skip xfs quota test on non-Linux, add build tag
Fix: CubeSandbox Exec/Destroy test failures in internal/worker/sandbox
Verify: config.yaml DSN and Redis addr aligned with docker-compose.yml
Verify: server startup auto-migrate — confirm ent schema auto-migration on boot
Run: docker-compose up postgres redis minio + go run ./cmd/server — full startup test
Fix: runtime panic→error for role/tool not found — internal/agent/roles/roles.go:815 and internal/agent/react/tool.go:133 should return error instead of panic
E2E验证: Submit+Get+List — 通过connect-go客户端提交任务、查询、列表
E2E验证: 任务状态流转 — pending→running→completed
E2E验证: Decide接口 — 路由决策
E2E验证: WebSocket实时推送
E2E验证: MCP工具调用
集成验证脚本 — 一键跑通全链路
fix: Gateway 添加 REST 适配路由，对齐 MCP Client 协议
fix: MCP Client APIResponse 解析空指针防护
fix: Gateway REST 适配 - 任务 CRUD 端点(Submit/Get/List/Cancel)
fix: Gateway REST 适配 - 决策与编排端点(Decompose/Decide/Diff)
fix: Gateway REST 适配 - 查询端点(AgentTemplates/Sessions/PlatformStatus)
fix: MCP Client 请求/响应字段映射验证与修复
test: MCP Server 端到端验证 - stdio 调用全工具
fix: docker-compose.prod.yml 容器配置错误(PostgreSQL/Redis/MinIO)
verify: 检查 REST Adapter 已实现的端点
docs: 完整链路差距分析 — 从 MCP task_submit 到 Agent 执行完成
fix: Orchestrator 注入到 TaskService — 连接事件处理和任务编排
fix: 实现 handleTaskSubmitted — 自动触发任务拆解和执行
fix: TaskService/Orchestrator 调用 Worker 执行子任务
fix: Eino 编排图接入 LLM — 任务分析和拆解需要真实 LLM 调用
fix: Worker 执行后自动 git commit + push 到 result branch
fix: Guardian 审批集成 — 高风险操作暂停等待用户确认
fix: REST Adapter placeholder 端点补全(ListAgents/Sessions/PlatformStatus)
test: 端到端集成测试 — 从 MCP submit 到 Agent 执行完成
